fields.name: org_activities_description
fields.label: Description of Primary Activities of Organization

fields.name: triage_checklist
fields.label: Triage Checklist
items: Is the notification readable and free of malicious links?
Does the request broadly align with IMHOGEN's services?
Is the contact information apparently valid and legible?

sections.title: Systems Engineering Translation
sections.description: Translate client request into engineering operands. Fill N/A if not applicable.

sections.title: Missing Information
sections.description: Items to clarify during Discovery Meeting

sections.title: Source Asset Evaluation
sections.description: Evaluate what the client has provided as input

fields.name: data_sufficient_for_tolerances
fields.label: Does the provided source data allow for the requested tolerances?

fields.name: site_visit_required
fields.label: Is a site visit required for manual measurements?

fields.name: agenda
fields.label: Agenda Items
items: Introductions & Project Overview (05 mins) — Project Manager
Technical Requirements: Inputs / Outputs (15 mins) — Lead Engineer
Operational Environment & Constraints (10 mins) — Lead Engineer
Commercial Expectations: Timeline / Budget (05 mins) — Project Manager
Next Steps & Q&A (05 mins) — Project Manager

fields.name: pre_meeting_checklist
fields.label: Pre-Meeting Checklist
items: Has the Lead Engineer reviewed D1.3 (Received Request Record)?
Is the meeting recording software / consent prepared?
Have reference documents (D1.1) been opened for screen sharing?

sections.title: Engineering Operands & Operators
sections.description: Confirmed constraints and specifications from discovery meeting

fields.name: photo_checklist
fields.label: Required Views
items: Isometric / 3/4 View — Must show overall machine context
Nameplate / Specs — Serial numbers and motor ratings
Complex Interfaces — Close-ups of gears, splines, connectors

fields.name: reference_documents
fields.label: Required Reading Documents
items: D1.3 Received Request Record
D1.8 Needs Assessment Notes
Client Supplementary Uploads (D1.1)

fields.name: technical_capability
fields.label: Technical Capability Checklist
items: Does IMHOGEN possess the core engineering expertise for this design?
Can the physical product be fabricated using our standard workshop tools?
Are the required raw materials reliably accessible in our local supply chain?
Do we have the software / computing capability to run necessary simulations?

fields.name: commercial_alignment
fields.label: Commercial Alignment Checklist
items: Does the client's estimated budget align with the scale of work?
Is this project aligned with IMHOGEN's long-term strategic goals?

fields.name: risk_conclusion_checklist
fields.label: Risk Evaluation
items: Are there any High Probability / High Impact risks that cannot be mitigated?
Does the mitigation of these risks push the project over the client's budget?
Is IMHOGEN willing to accept the residual risk of this project?

tools.notes: Used as Fast-Track Feasibility in Tier 3

columns.name: mandatory_mitigation
columns.label: Mandatory Mitigation Strategy (Must be in Contract)

sections.title: Excluded Scope
sections.description: Out of scope — to prevent scope creep

fields.name: markup_layers
fields.label: Markup Breakdown
items: Project Management & QC
Administrative Overhead
Sustainability / Risk Margin

sections.title: Final Allocated Budget
sections.description: Client-facing cost breakdown — must match SOW D1.13 deliverables

fields.name: minimum_overhead_met
fields.label: Is the minimum overhead recovery met?

tools.notes: Client-facing document — shared with client for review and comment

fields.name: mandatory_exclusions
fields.label: Exclusions
items: No Structural Analysis or FEA included.
No Material Selection Advice.
No Fabrication Liability.

fields.name: d1_15_link
fields.label: Link to D1.15 Project Brief & Budget

sections.title: Contracting Directives
sections.description: Critical risks and exclusions to enforce in the contract

fields.name: handoff_checklist
fields.label: Handoff Tasks
items: Has the central database status been updated to 'Contracting Phase'?
Have all D1.1 to D1.15 documents been moved to the permanent digital folder?
Is the Contract Admin fully clear on the technical deliverables to be billed?
